name: Python 3.12
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y <packages.txt; command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh; uv sync --locked; echo '✅ uv environment installed'

postAttachCommand.server: uv run streamlit run app.py --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
